title: Widowmaker Collection - Vic's Point Blank
description: A collection of unique high quality guns for Vic's Point Blank.
body:
A collection of hard hitting haymaking soul killing pin strikers for Vic's Point Blank, consisting of many guns not based on real life or only taking some inspiration from real life.

Installation Guide : 
Make sure you have Vic's Point Blank installed
Go to your minecraft folder and make a new file named "pointblank"
Download and paste the content pack (this pack) into your "pointblank" folder
Boot up and have fun idk 

Texture credits to : Chitab(Judge, Jury, Excecutioner, Fabricator, Blackout), Akwa717(Stampede, Firedrake), Larsh512(Unused gun but hey thanks anyways).
